_comment: Edit this file to change which organizations are tracked. 'query' is the PubMed affiliation search (broad, to catch everything). 'match' are the lowercase phrases used to verify/attribute each author's affiliation locally. Add more variants if you find papers being missed.
_genetics_note: A paper is flagged 'genetics' if its title OR abstract contains any of these whole words (case-insensitive). The user asked for gene/genetic/genetics/genomics/mutation; plurals and 'genomic' were added for completeness.

organizations.name: UT Arlington
organizations.query: "University of Texas at Arlington"[Affiliation] OR "University of Texas Arlington"[Affiliation] OR "UT Arlington"[Affiliation] OR "Univ Texas Arlington"[Affiliation]
